/usr/bin/c++ -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/image_processor.dir/image_processor.cpp.o CMakeFiles/image_processor.dir/bmp/BmpReader.cpp.o CMakeFiles/image_processor.dir/bmp/BmpWriter.cpp.o CMakeFiles/image_processor.dir/controller/help.cpp.o CMakeFiles/image_processor.dir/controller/parser.cpp.o CMakeFiles/image_processor.dir/controller/pipeline.cpp.o CMakeFiles/image_processor.dir/image/Color.cpp.o CMakeFiles/image_processor.dir/image/Image.cpp.o CMakeFiles/image_processor.dir/filters/CropFilter.cpp.o CMakeFiles/image_processor.dir/filters/FilterBuilder.cpp.o CMakeFiles/image_processor.dir/filters/PixelFilter.cpp.o CMakeFiles/image_processor.dir/filters/MatrixFilter.cpp.o CMakeFiles/image_processor.dir/filters/BlurFilter.cpp.o CMakeFiles/image_processor.dir/filters/EdgeFilter.cpp.o CMakeFiles/image_processor.dir/filters/GrayscaleFilter.cpp.o CMakeFiles/image_processor.dir/filters/NegativeFilter.cpp.o CMakeFiles/image_processor.dir/filters/SharpenFilter.cpp.o CMakeFiles/image_processor.dir/filters/SpiralFilter.cpp.o -o image_processor
